arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou names his decisive Tottenham stars vs Eintracht Frankfurt and his attacking call
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has revealed that Brennan Johnson's absence from the Tottenham XI at times recently has been part of a strategy of welcoming back injured players. "With Brennan, part of the strategy heading into this was we had quite a few players who were coming back from long-term injuries including Wilson, Destiny, Micky van de Ven, Romero.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Eintracht Frankfurt simulated to predict Europa League quarter-final clash
arts.sum: Eintracht beat Ajax 6-2 on aggregate to set up the quarter-final clash with Spurs, with the Europa League Postecoglou's only chance of winning a trophy and gaining Champions League qualification for next season. Tottenham return to Europa League action later tonight, with Ange Postecoglou's side taking on Eintracht Frankfurt in the Europa League quarter-finals first leg.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou may consider triple Tottenham change vs Frankfurt as Destiny Udogie call looms
arts.sum: Fresh from the win over Southampton last weekend, the head coach has a few selection calls to make before he makes the final decision on his Tottenham XI to face Eintracht Frankfurt . There is so much riding on this evening's game at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with Postecoglou's future potentially hinging on whether Spurs win the trophy or not in Bilbao come the end of May .

arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing low cost option to solve problem area – Club would be happy to sell
arts.sum: Tottenham are interested in Barcelona defender Eric García as he looks likely to leave the Camp Nou in the summer transfer window. That’s according to Fichajes.net, who report that Tottenham are one of several clubs keeping an eye on the defender. arts.sum: Manchester City are keen to add to their defensive ranks after what has been a difficult season under Pep Guardiola but their move for a Premier League star looks difficult

arts.ttl: Tottenham justify transfer decision after president questions why they sold player
arts.sum: Tottenham have reportedly been questioned on their decision to sell Davinson Sanchez to Galatasaray two years ago, by the Turkish club’s president. That’s according to Milliyet, who report that President Dursun Özbek questioned Tottenham about why they would have allowed the defender to leave in 2023. Sanchez joined the Turkish side in a €9.5m deal The post Tottenham justify transfer decision after president questions why they sold player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Everton have ‘ACCEPTED’ transfer for Jarrad Branthwaite
arts.sum: Everton have opened the door to Manchester United moving for centre-back Jarrad Branthwaite again this summer. A year ago, Man Utd hounded the Toffees to sell the centre-back, but after no deal was done, the Red Devils instead moved for Matthijs de Ligt.
